name: VIOX Music Server
author: Guidcruncher
description: ﻿﻿Music server that plays audio across multiple devices on a LAN using Snapcast
raw:
networks:
  proxy:
    external: true

services:
  dbmate:
    image: ghcr.io/amacneil/dbmate:latest
    container_name: dbmate
    hostname: dbmate
    volumes:
      - ./db/migrations:/db/migrations
      - ../run/data:/db
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: sqlite:/db/datastore.db
    entrypoint: ["dbmate"]
    command: ["up"]
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "[ -f /db/datastore.db ]"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 5

  viox-musicserver:
    depends_on:
      dbmate:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
    image: guidcruncher/viox-musicserver:latest
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: viox-musicserver
    hostname: viox-musicserver
    restart: unless-stopped
    secrets:
      - spotify-clientid
      - spotify-clientsecret

    # networks:
    #  - proxy
    network_mode: host
    dns:
      - 192.168.1.201
      - 8.8.8.8
      - 8.8.4.4
    # Device access for audio
    devices:
      - /dev/snd:/dev/snd

    # Volume mounts
    volumes:
      - ../run/config:/config
      - ../run/music:/music
      - ../run/data:/data
    environment:
      - XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/1000
      - BASE_URL=https://localhost
      - ENABLE_SPOTIFY_CACHE=false
      - RADIO_PROVIDER=tunein

    # Capabilities for audio access
    cap_add:
      - SYS_NICE

    # IPC for shared memory (PulseAudio)
    ipc: host

  viox-speaker:
    image: guidcruncher/viox-speaker:latest
    container_name: viox-speaker
    hostname: viox-speaker
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - viox-musicserver
    devices:
      - /dev/snd:/dev/snd
    environment:
      - VIOX_HOST=192.168.1.202
      - SPEAKER_NAME="VIOX Music Server""
    # Capabilities for audio access
    cap_add:
      - SYS_NICE
    # IPC for shared memory (PulseAudio)
    ipc: host

secrets:
  spotify-clientid:
    file: ../spotify-clientid.secret
  spotify-clientsecret:
   file: ../spotify-clientsecret.secret
